description: Stryker mutation baseline. 437 mutants across 5 Redux modules. Dominant survivors: OptionalChaining (91), StringLiteral (~15), EqualityOperator (~12), ArrowFunction (~8).
Added result.type assertions to all thunk tests. Killed StringLiteral mutants on action type names.
Added toHaveBeenCalledWith assertions and empty errors[] boundary tests. Killed EqualityOperator and call-arg mutants.
Added {data: null} graceful handling tests. Killed OptionalChaining mutants on response?.data?.errors chain.
Type-only assertions on null response tests. No gain — both original and mutant produce same rejected type. Need payload assertions.
Fixed: applied correct payload assertions per error-path pattern. Modules with || error fallback → toHaveProperty('response'). No fallback → toBeUndefined(). parseGatewayError → typeof === string.
Added {response:{data:null}} tests for second-level OptionalChaining. Undefined payload in reducer rejected handlers. Null meta.arg tests. Goal met: 85.25% > 75% target.
